holdings.infoBox: CSMD is an equity ETF with a total of 47 individual holdings. The top holdings are nVent Electric stock at 5.07%, Sterling Infrastructure at 5.04%, Curtiss-Wright at 4.26%, Rambus at 4.16%, and Comfort Systems USA at 4.10%.

overview.description: The Congress SMid Growth ETF (CSMD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that seeks long-term capital appreciation by investing in small- and mid-cap companies believed to be experiencing or will experience earnings growth. CSMD was launched on Aug 22, 2023 and is issued by Congress.
